title: passiflora coactilis
intro: Passiflora coactilis, also known as the fragrant granadilla, is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Passiflora coactilis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Passiflora coactilis often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
